name: specrail
description: Spec-driven orchestration service for coding-agent workflows

scripts.validate: pnpm check:links && pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.test: tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json --test --test-force-exit scripts/__tests__/*.test.mjs packages/core/src/domain/__tests__/*.test.ts packages/core/src/services/__tests__/*.test.ts packages/config/src/__tests__/*.test.ts packages/adapters/src/__tests__/*.test.ts apps/api/src/__tests__/*.test.ts apps/acp-server/src/__tests__/*.test.ts apps/github/src/__tests__/*.test.ts apps/telegram/src/__tests__/*.test.ts apps/terminal/src/__tests__/*.test.ts
